steps.title: Recognize the task: find similarity, not difference
steps.content: The question explicitly asks which choice emphasizes how the two works are similar. This is the decisive clue—the correct choice must highlight what's shared, not what's different between the two works.

steps.title: Apply the task to the choices
steps.content:
C directly addresses similarity by stating that both works use acrylic paint as a medium.
  • A arranges completion dates in sequence
  • B explicitly compares their sizes
  • D uses while to contrast their materials
. That matches choice C — C is correct.
